DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS GARRETT BAUMGARTNER AND GOLDEN STATE LUMBER'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, SET NO. ONE, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. DEFENDANTS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY SET ONE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES AND PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS. SANCTIONS ARE DUE WITHIN THREE WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery, Set No. One, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Lamb, esq. (925-389-0323) of Ratto Law Firm, P.C. for Plaintiff Ethena Diaz via court call.
Adam V. Truong, esq. (415-981-5411) of Bledso Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP for Defendants GARRETT BAUMGARTNER and GOLDEN STATE LUMBER.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GARRETT BAUMGARTNER and GOLDEN STATE LUMBER's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery, Set No. One, And For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendants' unopposed Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery Set One is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses and produce responsive documents within two weeks of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $1,000.00 are awarded against plaintiff in favor of defendants. Sanctions are due within three weeks of notice of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
